name_en: Top-tier Original M45777 Grey Screen Print
name_cn:
Top-tier Original M45777 Grey Screen Print
【Three-Piece Mahjong Purse】
New style full leather print, extremely practical.
Stars and fashionistas basically have one, and they appear in photos very often.
Unconstrained by season, it matches clothes perfectly in any season.
Wearing the three-piece set instantly transforms you from an ordinary person into a fashion-savvy 'blogger' 😎
Large: 23.5×13×4.5cm
Small: 18.5×11×4.5cm
